title: OREGON MUSEUM OF SCIENCE AND INDUSTRY - 211info
text: OREGON MUSEUM OF SCIENCE AND INDUSTRY OREGON MUSEUM OF SCIENCE AND INDUSTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A science and technology museum that contains three auditoriums, a planetarium, and exhibition halls with a variety of hands-on exhibits focused on natural sciences, industry, and technology. Also offers programs, camps, and classes. 1945 SE Water Avenue Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Regular Hours: Tuesday-Sunday 9:30am-5:30pm Summer Hours: 7 days per week 9:30am-5:30pm, June 16-September 2 Email (503) 797-4000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 797-4000 Main phone Museum hours, admission, and events message line (800) 955-6674 Toll-free Museum hours, admission, and events message line Main phone (503) 797-4000 Toll-free (800) 955-6674 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: General admission: Children age 3 and under: None Youth ages 3-13: $15 Adults age 14 and older: $20 Seniors age 63 and older: $17 Group rates, military, and EBT discounts are available. Financial assistance may be available for camps and classes. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The OMSI/SE Water Avenue Station connects with TriMet bus and MAX light rail, and Portland Streetcar lines Services: Camps Museums Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - SUMMER CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
